zh.Bracewell Craven, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾布拉可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Waddington於大約1225年出生在英國越可爾瓦丁頓時，她的父親Walter Waddington20歲，母親Sarah Featherston11歲。她於大約1250年與Sir Roger III Tempest結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1302年3月8日在英國越可爾布拉可維爾享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Waddington于大约1225年出生在英国越可爾瓦丁頓时，她的父亲Walter Waddington20岁，母亲Sarah Featherston11岁。她于大约1250年与Sir Roger III Tempest结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1302年3月8日在英国越可爾布拉可維爾享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waddington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name mostly from Waddington in Yorkshire, but also from Waddington in Lincolnshire and perhaps occasionally Waddington in Coulsdon (Surrey). The first two placenames derive from the Old English personal name Wada + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Surrey placename derives from Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’, later hwǣten ‘growing with wheat’ + dūn ‘hill’.

variants.name: Wadlington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Waddington   or   Watlington  .

variants.name: Weddington
meanings: English: habitational name from Weddington in Warwickshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Watintune, from an unattested Old English personal name Hwæt + -ing- denoting association with + tūn ‘estate’. However, the surname does not appear in English sources and it may simply be an altered form of Waddington .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Waddington was born about 1225, in Waddington, Yorkshire, England, her father, Walter Waddington, was 20 and her mother, Sarah Featherston, was 11. She married Sir Roger III Tempest about 1250. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 8 March 1302, in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Waddington est née environ 1225, à Waddington, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Walter Waddington, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Featherston, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Roger III Tempest environ 1250. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 8 mars 1302, à Bracewell, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Waddington um 1225 in Waddington, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Waddington 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah Featherston 11. Sie hat um 1250 Sir Roger III Tempest geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 8. März 1302 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Bracewell, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waddington è nata il circa 1225 nel Waddington, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Walter Waddington, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Sarah Featherston, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Sir Roger III Tempest circa 1250. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 8 marzo 1302, nel Bracewell, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Waddington(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 요르크실르 와딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Waddington(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Featherston(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1250년 Sir Roger III Tempest(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1302년 3월 8일 영국 요르크실르 브라스웰에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waddington nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Waddington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Waddington, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Featherston, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Roger III Tempest aproximadamente 1250. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 8 de março de 1302, em Bracewell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Waddington родилась около 1225 г. в местности ваддингтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Waddington было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Featherston, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Roger III Tempest около 1250 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 8 марта 1302 г. в местности бреисюелл, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.
